system.description:
At 7th level, your legend crystallizes into a distinct Mythic Fable—a heroic role that defines the style and substance of your myth. Choose one of the following personas. Each grants you a passive feature that reflects your legendary identity and a new way to expend @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.SdkTtahNdnXE8OEA]{Legend Dice} for a unique, thematic effect. These Mythic Fables are propositions, you are free to create new ones in cooperation with your game master.

The Ember Knight

Passive: You gain resistance to fire damage.

Legend Dice Feature — Burning Reversal: When a creature within 5 feet hits you with a melee weapon attack, you can expend a Legend Die as a reaction. The attacker takes fire damage equal to the result, and must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (Maneuver DC) or catch fire, taking 1d6 fire damage at the start of its turns for 1 minute or until they use an action to put out the fire.

The Crimson Shadow

Passive: You gain advantage on Stealth checks and can move through the space of Large or larger creatures without penalty.

Legend Dice Feature — Vengeful Echo: When a creature within 30 feet deals damage to you or an ally, you can expend a Legend Die as a reaction to mark them. The next time you hit that creature before the end of your next turn, add the Legend Die to the attack’s damage and the creature has disadvantage on attack roll until the end of its next turn.

The Flame-Wrought Prince

Passive: Allies within 10 feet of you ( including you) gain a +1 bonus to saving throws.

Legend Dice Feature — Royal Edict: When a creature within 30 feet that can see or hear you makes an attack roll or saving throw, you may expend a Legend Die as a reaction to add the result to their roll.

The Last Giant-Slayer

Passive: You gain advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks made to shove or grapple creatures larger than you as well as an expertise die when attacking creatures bigger than you.

Legend Dice Feature — Titan’s Fall: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you may expend a Legend Die to attempt to knock it down. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (Maneuver DC) or be knocked prone and take extra damage equal to the result.

The Thunderous Banner

Passive: Whenever you roll initiative, you and each ally within 60 feet gain a bonus to initiative equal to your proficiency bonus.

Legend Dice Feature — Shout of the Story: As a bonus action, expend a Legend Die to rally nearby allies. Each ally within 15 feet gains temporary hit points equal to the result and an expertise die on their next saving throw made before the end of their next turn.

The Frost-Marked Pariah

Passive: You gain resistance to cold damage, and ignore movement penalties from ice and snow.

Legend Dice Feature — Winter Requital: When a creature ends its turn within 5 feet of you, you can expend a Legend Die as a reaction to force it to make a Constitution saving throw (Maneuver DC). On a failure, its speed is halved until the end of its next turn and it takes cold damage equal to the result.

The Sky-Sundered Meteor

Passive: You can fall up to 30 feet without taking falling damage. You also gain proficiency in Acrobatics or Performance (your choice).

Legend Dice Feature — Meteoric Momentum: When you move at least 20 feet in a straight line before making a melee weapon attack, you can expend a Legend Die to increase your speed. For 1 minute, your speed is increased by 5ft. You can stack speed increases if you use Meteoric Momentum again. Additionally, you can Dash as a bonus action during the turn you activate this legend dice feature.
